description: Atlas adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

defaultCommands: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$required = @('README.md','docs/STACK_OVERVIEW.md','docs/SYSTEM_REGISTRY.md','docs/OWNERSHIP_BOUNDARIES.md','docs/CONTRACT_MAP.md','docs/LOCAL_FIRST_WORKFLOW.md','docs/PLAYBOOK_PROMOTION_MODEL.md'); $missing = @($required | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }); if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Missing required Atlas docs: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 1 }"

notes: ATLAS completion for the UI-governance lane is blocked unless the derived proof summary reports completion_ready=true.
The proof summary remains a compatibility projection over root-owned semantic drift and visual proof artifacts.
Atlas root may own validation and projection tooling under ops, tests, and schemas, but it must not become a second owner-truth UI store.
Proof enforcement in _stack stays consumer-side: root emits the derived proof signal, and the runner blocks completion when that signal is red or missing.
Prefer cross-links into _stack and Playbook over copying operator-command detail or implemented governance detail into Atlas.

docsUpdateRules: If Atlas architecture shape, proof-gate behavior, or stack role changes, keep README.md, docs/STACK_OVERVIEW.md, docs/SYSTEM_REGISTRY.md, docs/OWNERSHIP_BOUNDARIES.md, and docs/LOCAL_FIRST_WORKFLOW.md aligned in the same change or immediately after.
Atlas may implement root-owned validation, projection, and read-only ops tooling under ops/tests/schemas, but it must not copy owner-repo primitive truth into root.
Prefer cross-links into _stack and Playbook over copying operator-command detail or implemented governance detail into Atlas.
